groupings.title: Creative Frontend — Astro · GSAP · Remotion
groupings.description: Hub-and-spoke cluster for animated, content-driven Astro sites and programmatic video. The orchestrator routes between in-browser animation (GSAP ScrollTrigger, Anime.js, web-motion-library) over an Astro substrate and render-time video (Remotion), with a shared core holding the in-browser-vs-video decision matrix, reduced-motion baseline, performance budget, and Astro hydration boundaries.

groupings.title: Tauri — cross-platform desktop & mobile (Rust + web)
groupings.description: Flagship cluster: 40 Tauri v2 specialists behind one router. The orchestrator places a task on the lifecycle×concern map (scaffold, configure, IPC/Rust↔frontend bridge, windows/chrome, sidecars, plugins, build/sign/distribute, debug/test, migrate) and delegates; tauri-core holds the shared security model — capabilities → permissions → scopes, the IPC trust boundary, CSP, and the process/runtime model — plus the per-platform distribution matrix.
